mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM acm_schedule_mst WHERE 1=1
AND SCD_SE LIKE CONCAT ('%', #{searchKeyword},'%')

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(sysdate(),'%Y-%m-%d') TO_DAY, A.SCD_ID, A.SCD_SE, A.SCD_DEPT_ID, A.SCD_KIND_CODEE, A.SCD_BGNDE, A.SCD_ENDDE, A.SCD_NM, A.SCD_DESC, A.SCD_PLACE, A.SCD_IPCR_CODE, A.SCD_CHARGER_ID, A.ATCH_FILE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'%Y-%m-%d') FRST_REGISTER_PNTTM, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID, A.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID, A.REPTIT_SE_CODE FROM acm_schedule_mst A WHERE 1=1 AND A.SCD_KIND_CODE = '2' AND (A.SCD_CHARGER_ID = #{uniqId} OR A.FRST_REGISTER_ID = #{uniqId}) AND ( ( SUBSTRING(A.SCD_BGNDE,1,8) >= DATE_FORMAT(sysdate(),'%Y%m%d') AND SUBSTRING(A.SCD_BGNDE,1,8) <= DATE_FORMAT(sysdate(),'%Y%m%d')) OR ( SUBSTRING(A.SCD_ENDDE,1,8) > DATE_FORMAT(sysdate(),'%Y%m%d') AND SUBSTRING(A.SCD_BGNDE,1,8) <= DATE_FORMAT(sysdate(),'%Y%m%d')) ) ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC LIMIT 0, 4

SELECT A.SCD_ID, A.SCD_SE, A.SCD_DEPT_ID, A.SCD_KIND_CODE, A.SCD_BGNDE, A.SCD_ENDDE, A.SCD_NM, A.SCD_DESC, A.SCD_PLACE, A.SCD_IPCR_CODE, A.SCD_CHARGER_ID, (SELECT USER_NM FROM acm_member_mst WHERE EMPLYR_ID = A.SCD_CHARGER_ID) SCD_CHARGER_NAME, A.ATCH_FILE_ID, A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM FRST_REGISTER_PNTTM, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID, A.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID, A.REPTIT_SE_CODE FROM acm_schedule_mst A WHERE 1=1 AND A.SCD_KIND_CODE = '2'
AND (#{searchMonth} BETWEEN SUBSTRING(A.SCD_BGNDE, 1, 6) AND SUBSTRING(A.SCD_ENDDE, 1, 6) )
AND ( ( SUBSTRING(A.SCD_BGNDE,1,8) >= #{scdBgnde} AND SUBSTRING(A.SCD_BGNDE,1,8) <= #{scdEndde}) OR ( SUBSTRING(A.SCD_ENDDE,1,8) > #{scdBgnde} AND SUBSTRING(A.SCD_BGNDE,1,8) <= #{scdEndde}) )
AND (#{searchDay} BETWEEN SUBSTRING(A.SCD_BGNDE, 1, 8) AND SUBSTRING(A.SCD_ENDDE, 1, 8) )
AND SCD_SE LIKE CONCAT ('%', #{searchKeyword},'%')
order by A.SCD_BGNDE , (1+(SUBSTRING(A.SCD_ENDDE,1, 8) - SUBSTRING(A.SCD_BGNDE, 1, 8))) desc

SELECT A.SCD_ID, A.SCD_SE, A.SCD_DEPT_ID, (SELECT ORGNZT_NM FROM acm_org_mst WHERE ORGNZT_ID = A.SCD_DEPT_ID) SCD_DEPT_NAME, A.SCD_KIND_CODE, A.SCD_BGNDE, A.SCD_ENDDE, A.SCD_NM, A.SCD_DESC, A.SCD_PLACE, A.SCD_IPCR_CODE, A.SCD_CHARGER_ID, (SELECT USER_NM FROM acm_member_mst WHERE EMPLYR_ID = A.SCD_CHARGER_ID) SCD_CHARGER_NAME, A.ATCH_FILE_ID, A.REPTIT_SE_CODE, A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID, A.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID FROM acm_schedule_mst A WHERE 1=1 AND SCD_ID = #{scdId}
mapper.update: UPDATE acm_schedule_mst SET SCD_SE=#{scdSe}, SCD_DEPT_ID=#{scdDeptId}, SCD_KIND_CODE=#{scdKindCode}, SCD_BGNDE=#{scdBgnde}, SCD_ENDDE=#{scdEndde}, SCD_NM=#{scdNm}, SCD_DESC=#{scdDesc}, SCD_IPCR_CODE=#{scdIpcrCode}, SCD_CHARGER_ID=#{scdChargerId}, ATCH_FILE_ID=#{atchFileId}, REPTIT_SE_CODE=#{reptitSeCode}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = sysdate(), LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{lastUpdusrId} WHERE SCD_ID = #{scdId}
